---
title: "NYC Climate Week: Clean Energy Global Supply Chains Panel"
description: "Join us to discuss Role of Clean Energy Global Supply Chains in Achieving Climate Goals during NYC Climate Week."
image: flyer.png
author: "Baruch We Are Climate Action"
date: "2024-09-26"
#categories: [news, event]
#bibliography: references.bib
csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
suppress-bibliography: true
link-citations: false
citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: moderator
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://drganghe.github.io
      image: https://drganghe.github.io/files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg
      title: "Gang HE"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

- id: panelists
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.jhelvy.com/
      image: https://www.jhelvy.com/images/lab/john_helveston_circle.png
      title: "John HELVESTON"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, George Washington University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://gps.ucsd.edu/faculty-directory/michael-davidson.html
      image: https://gps.ucsd.edu/_images/people/faculty/faculty_davidson.jpg
      title: "Michael DAVIDSON"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, University of California, San Diego"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://mhqiu.github.io/
      image: https://www.stonybrook.edu/commcms/somas/people/_profiles/images/minghao-qiu.jpg
      title: "Minghao QIU"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, Stony Brook University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://sustainablesolutions.stanford.edu/people/shi-chen
      image: https://sustainablesolutions.stanford.edu/sites/g/files/sbiybj31186/files/styles/medium_square/public/media/image/chen_1.jpg
      title: "Shi CHEN"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Carnegie Science"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://kaifangluo.com
      image: https://scholar.googleusercontent.com/citations?view_op=medium_photo&user=k90TPGUAAAAJ&citpid=3
      title: "Kaifang LUO"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

[![Flyer Credit: Designed by Ruzdo Srdanovic](flyer.png)](https://baruch.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZApd-ivqzIiGt1Ch39rPPC_m1T8Sk9mlVy-#/registration)

## Title

Role of Clean Energy Global Supply Chains in Achieving Climate Goals

### Time

Thursday, September 26, 3:00PM - 4:15PM

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please register [here](https://baruch.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZApd-ivqzIiGt1Ch39rPPC_m1T8Sk9mlVy-#/registration).

## About
Global clean energy supply chains stand at a critical intersection of integration and decoupling. The panel will discuss the evolving landscape, benefits and challenges, and future directions of clean energy global supply chains, to meet climate goals while addressing growing international and domestic concerns. 


## Moderator

:::{#moderator}
:::


## Panelists

:::{#panelists}
:::


## References

- @helveston_he_davidson_2022 
- @chen2023deploying 
- @davidson2022risks 
- @helveston2019china
